{{CargoRelic
|name=Acupuncture Figure
|class_id=20314
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=Something odd just got mixed in with the mound of movie awards! It does look like a trophy from a film festival and yet it is another proof of the bad taste of the development team!
|fame=12
|art=14
|fth=18
|civ=29
|tech=17
|ss1=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20<br>Snail RUSH +20
|ss2=Snail ATK +40<br>Snail DEF +40<br>Snail RUSH +40
|ss3=Snail ATK +60<br>Snail DEF +60<br>Snail RUSH +60
|ss4=Snail ATK +60<br>Snail DEF +60<br>Snail RUSH +60
|ss7=Snail ATK +60<br>Snail DEF +60<br>Snail RUSH +60<br> (Awakened)
}}
